product.title: VBulletin by Tornevall Tools
product.description: Tornevall Tools integration for vBulletin, including AI-assisted editor tools through the vBulletin API system.

phrasetype.name: vBulletin Settings
phrasetype.phrase: Enable or disable the vBulletin AI assistant globally.
Select which AI backend should handle requests. Tornevall Tools uses https://tools.tornevall.net. Direct OpenAI uses OpenAI API settings below.
Bearer token created in https://tools.tornevall.net. Store only the raw token value, without the Bearer prefix. Used when AI Provider is Tornevall Tools.
Base URL for Tornevall Tools. Default is https://tools.tornevall.net. Used when AI Provider is Tornevall Tools.
OpenAI API key used when AI Provider is Direct OpenAI. Store only the raw key value, without the Bearer prefix.
Base URL for direct OpenAI requests. Default is https://api.openai.com/v1.
Model used for direct OpenAI requests.
Timeout in seconds for direct OpenAI API requests.
Client slug registered in Tornevall Tools. Used when AI Provider is Tornevall Tools.
Numeric custom profile field id for the user's AI persona. Example: 67 means userfield.field67. Leave 0 to disable persona loading.
Allow AI web search when useful. Source-sensitive requests may still force web search. Direct OpenAI uses OpenAI web_search_preview tooling when selected.
Require web search for all AI requests. Recommended default is No. Source-sensitive requests can still require web search automatically.
Controls how much forum/editor/thread context is sent by default. Profile-level context mode overrides this setting. Values: full or request_only.

Controls per-author consent filtering when thread context is sent. require_opt_in only includes posts from users who explicitly consented. allow_unless_opt_out excludes only users who opted out. disabled turns consent filtering off.

Numeric custom profile field id that lets each user override AI context mode. Accepted values include full, request_only, no_context, full_context, bara_onskemal and hela_kontexten. Leave 0 to disable profile override.
Numeric custom profile field id that lets each user enable or disable AI. Accepted disabled values include no, nej, off, disabled, av, ai_disabled and 0. Leave 0 to disable profile override.

Numeric custom profile field id used for per-user AI context consent. Accepted opt-in values include yes, ja, allow, consent and opt_in. Accepted opt-out values include no, nej, deny, no_consent and opt_out.
Disable AI Context in Private Nodes
When enabled, private, closed, restricted or unknown node privacy status blocks thread context and forces request-only behavior for that request. Recommended default is Yes.

setting.title: AI Enabled
setting.description: Enable or disable the vBulletin AI assistant globally.

setting.title: AI Provider
setting.description: Select which AI backend should handle requests. Tornevall Tools uses https://tools.tornevall.net. Direct OpenAI uses OpenAI API settings below.

setting.title: Tornevall Tools API Token
setting.description: Bearer token created in https://tools.tornevall.net. Store only the raw token value, without the Bearer prefix. Used when AI Provider is Tornevall Tools.

setting.title: Tornevall Tools API Base URL
setting.description: Base URL for Tornevall Tools. Default is https://tools.tornevall.net. Used when AI Provider is Tornevall Tools.

setting.title: OpenAI API Key
setting.description: OpenAI API key used when AI Provider is Direct OpenAI. Store only the raw key value, without the Bearer prefix.

setting.title: OpenAI API Base URL
setting.description: Base URL for direct OpenAI requests. Default is https://api.openai.com/v1.

setting.title: OpenAI Model
setting.description: Model used for direct OpenAI requests.

setting.title: OpenAI Request Timeout
setting.description: Timeout in seconds for direct OpenAI API requests.

setting.title: Tornevall Tools AI Client Slug
setting.description: Client slug registered in Tornevall Tools. Used when AI Provider is Tornevall Tools.

setting.title: GPT Persona Profile Field ID
setting.description: Numeric custom profile field id for the user's AI persona. Example: 67 means userfield.field67. Leave 0 to disable persona loading.

setting.title: Allow AI Web Search
setting.description: Allow AI web search when useful. Source-sensitive requests may still force web search. Direct OpenAI uses OpenAI web_search_preview tooling when selected.

setting.title: Require AI Web Search
setting.description: Require web search for all AI requests. Recommended default is No. Source-sensitive requests can still require web search automatically.

setting.title: Default AI Context Mode
setting.description: Controls how much forum/editor/thread context is sent by default. Profile-level context mode overrides this setting. Values: full or request_only.

setting.title: AI Context Consent Mode
setting.description: Controls per-author consent filtering when thread context is sent. require_opt_in only includes posts from users who explicitly consented. allow_unless_opt_out excludes only users who opted out. disabled turns consent filtering off.
setting.optioncode: select:piped require_opt_in|Require opt-in allow_unless_opt_out|Allow unless opt-out disabled|Disabled

setting.title: Profile Context Mode Field ID
setting.description: Numeric custom profile field id that lets each user override AI context mode. Accepted values include full, request_only, no_context, full_context, bara_onskemal and hela_kontexten. Leave 0 to disable profile override.

setting.title: Profile AI Enabled Field ID
setting.description: Numeric custom profile field id that lets each user enable or disable AI. Accepted disabled values include no, nej, off, disabled, av, ai_disabled and 0. Leave 0 to disable profile override.

setting.title: Profile Context Consent Field ID
setting.description: Numeric custom profile field id used for per-user AI context consent. Accepted opt-in values include yes, ja, allow, consent and opt_in. Accepted opt-out values include no, nej, deny, no_consent and opt_out.

setting.title: Disable AI Context in Private Nodes
setting.description: When enabled, private, closed, restricted or unknown node privacy status blocks thread context and forces request-only behavior for that request. Recommended default is Yes.
